title: senna trianae
intro: Senna trianae, also known as Guatemalan senna, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to Central America. The medicinal properties of Senna trianae are derived from its seeds, which contain anthraquinone glycosides, a type of laxative compound. The health benefits of Senna trianae include its ability to treat constipation, as well as its use as a purgative to help remove parasites and worms from the body. In herbal preparations, Senna trianae is often used as a dried leaf or seed infusion, and it can also be found in capsule or powder form, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
